'''jarate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:multifocally|multifocally]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-r-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:multifocally|multifocally]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jarate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:jarate|jarate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jaratesher|jaratesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jaratesherĂ«m|jaratesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jaratero|jaratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jarateshĂ«|jarateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jarateshĂ«m|jarateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijaratero|gokijaratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijarateshĂ«|gokijarateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijarateshĂ«m|gokijarateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojarankerom|gojarankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojarankeshĂ«|gojarankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojarankeshĂ«m|gojarankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojarankeya|gojarankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jaraterom|jaraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jaratemu|jaratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jarateya|jarateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijaraterom|gokijaraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijaratemu|gokijaratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijarateya|gokijarateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:jararate|jararate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jararatesher|jararatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jararatesherĂ«m|jararatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jararatero|jararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jararateshĂ«|jararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jararateshĂ«m|jararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijararatero|gokijararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijararateshĂ«|gokijararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijararateshĂ«m|gokijararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojararankerom|gojararankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojararankeshĂ«|gojararankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojararankeshĂ«m|gojararankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojararankeya|gojararankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jararaterom|jararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jararatemu|jararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jararateya|jararateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijararaterom|gokijararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijararatemu|gokijararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijararateya|gokijararateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:jĂŠrĂŠte|jĂŠrĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jĂŠrĂŠtesher|jĂŠrĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m|jĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠrĂŠtero|jĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|jĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|jĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠrĂŠtero|gokijĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|gokijĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|gokijĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojĂŠrĂŠnkerom|gojĂŠrĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«|gojĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gojĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojĂŠrĂŠnkeya|gojĂŠrĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jĂŠrĂŠterom|jĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jĂŠrĂŠtemu|jĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jĂŠrĂŠteya|jĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijĂŠrĂŠterom|gokijĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijĂŠrĂŠtemu|gokijĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijĂŠrĂŠteya|gokijĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:jafrafte|jafrafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:jafraftesher|jafraftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafraftesherĂ«m|jafraftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafraftero|jafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:jafrafteshĂ«|jafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafrafteshĂ«m|jafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafraftero|gokijafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokijafrafteshĂ«|gokijafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafrafteshĂ«m|gokijafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gojafrafnkerom|gojafrafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojafrafnkeshĂ«|gojafrafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojafrafnkeshĂ«m|gojafrafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gojafrafnkeya|gojafrafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:jafrafterom|jafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:jafraftemu|jafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:jafrafteya|jafrafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokijafrafterom|gokijafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokijafraftemu|gokijafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokijafrafteya|gokijafrafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
